title: chore(deps): update dependency babel-core to v6.26.3
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change | References |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| babel-core | devDependencies | patch | `6.26.0` -> `6.26.3` | [homepage](https://babeljs.io/), [source](https://renovatebot.com/gh/babel/babel) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>babel/babel</summary>

### [`v6.26.3`](https://renovatebot.com/gh/babel/babel/releases/v6.26.3)

[Compare Source](https://renovatebot.com/gh/babel/babel/compare/v6.26.2...v6.26.3)

##### Summary

-   Fixed a small regression from the backport of [#​7761](https://renovatebot.com/gh/babel/babel/issues/7761) from [#​7812](https://renovatebot.com/gh/babel/babel/issues/7812) if the output file contains no JS content

### [`v6.26.2`](https://renovatebot.com/gh/babel/babel/releases/v6.26.2)

[Compare Source](https://renovatebot.com/gh/babel/babel/compare/v6.26.0...v6.26.2)

##### Summary

-   Landed [#​7812](https://renovatebot.com/gh/babel/babel/issues/7812) which backported several fixes to make sourcemaps behave better
    -   [#​7312](https://renovatebot.com/gh/babel/babel/issues/7312) - Include better mappings for arrow-transformed 'this' and 'arguments'
    -   [#​7378](https://renovatebot.com/gh/babel/babel/issues/7378) - Include better mappings for import bindings transformed to member expressions
    -   [#​7761](https://renovatebot.com/gh/babel/babel/issues/7761) - Re-implement inputSourceMap merging logic to more accurately reflect mappings

</details>
